global.description: The aim of this expert system is to evaluate the atherosclerosis risk according to the information about patients life style, personal and family history (but without special laboratory tests). The result of consultation is the classification into one of groups risk non-risk; the numeric value assigned to these groups expresses "certainty" with which the system decides (the higher value the greater certainty). <BR><BR>The resulting decision of the system is only informative - it should by consulted with a physician. <BR><BR> The used knowlede was obtained automatically (using machine learning methods) from data colected during an epidemiological study of atherosclerosis primary prevention. This study was realized in the years 1976-1999 at the 2nd Department of Medicine, 1st Faculty of Medicine of Charles University and Charles University Hospital, U nemocnice 2, Prague 2 (head. Prof. MUDr. M. Aschermann, DrSc.), under the supervision of Prof. MUDr. F. Boudík, DrSc., with collaboration of MUDr. M. Tomečková, CSc. and Doc. MUDr. J. Bultas, CSc. The data were transferred to the electronic form by the European Centre of Medical Informatics, Statistics and Epidemiology of Charles University and Academy of Sciences (head. Prof. RNDr. J. Zvárová, DrSc). The data used to build the knowledge base were taken from the examination of 1419 middle-aged men when entering the study. More information about this study and about analyses of data from this study can be found at http://euromise.vse.cz/stulong .

attribute.name: What is your physical activity in job?
What is your physical activity after job?
attribute.comment: Moderate activity means working in the garden, walking, slow biking, slow swimming - several hours a week,<BR>great activity means sports at least one hour daily

attribute.name: What is your daily consumption of coffee?
What is your daily consumption of tea?
What is your daily consumption of beer?
Body mass index
attribute.comment: BMI (weight(kg) / (height(m) * height(m))<BR>19 - 25 : normal<BR>25 - 30 : overweight<BR>30 - 35 : obezity<BR>35 and more: extreme obezity

attribute.name: Cholesterol
attribute.comment: The level of cholesterolu can be given in two ways: in mg% or in mmol/l<BR><BR>for mg% the low level is in the range 110 to 240, medium level in the range 240 to 260 and high level above 260<BR><BR>for mmol/l the low level is bellow 6.2, medium level in the range 6.2 to 6.72 and high level above 6.72. Average cholesterol level in czech population is 5.8 what is considered as low risk hodnotu.<BR><BR>Systém podle výše zadané hodnoty odhadne, v jakých jednotkách je hladina cholesterolu zadána (pro hodnoty menší než 110 se předpokládá mmol/l)

attribute.name: Do you have hypertension?
attribute.comment: Hypertension = high level of blood preasure. Hypertension is considered for values greater than 140/90 mm Hg, when suffering from diabetes melitus for values greater than 130/85. Attention: If taking pills to decrease the blood preasure answer "certainly yes" regardless on the current blood preasure values.

attribute.name: Do you suffer from chest pain?
Specify the type of chest pain

proposition.name: hest pain of AP (angina pectoris) type

attribute.name: Do you suffer from lower limbs pain?
Specify the type of lower limbs pain
Did one of your parents die on cardiovascular disease (CVD)?
attribute.comment: Answer yes if father died on CVD younger than 55 years or mother died on CVD younger than 65 years.

attribute.name: Did the death parent suffer from hypertension?
Did the death parent suffer from angina pectoris?
Did the death parent suffer from ictus?
Did the death parent suffer from myocardial infarction?

proposition.name: Non risk group
proposition.comment: There is no risk for you concerning atherosclerosis.

proposition.name: Low risk group
proposition.comment: There is no direct risk for you concerning atherosclerosis at the moment but you should check your health status regularly.

proposition.name: Medium risk group
proposition.comment: You should better cousult your health status with your physician.

proposition.name: High risk group
proposition.comment: You must consult your health status with your physician.
